name: mashumaro (Fast Python Serialization)

performance.notes: Code-generated serializers; 2-10x faster than pydantic v1, comparable to msgspec

agent_readiness.notes: Fast dataclass-based serialization via code generation. from mashumaro import DataClassDictMixin. from dataclasses import dataclass. @dataclass. class User(DataClassDictMixin): name: str; age: int; email: str = ''. user = User.from_dict({'name': 'Alice', 'age': 30}). user.to_dict(). JSON: from mashumaro.codecs.json import JSONDecoder, JSONEncoder. decoder = JSONDecoder(User). user = decoder.decode(json_str). encoder = JSONEncoder(User). json_str = encoder.encode(user). Codecs: dict, json, msgpack, orjson. Type aliases, generics, custom encoders/decoders. Discriminated unions. Lazy imports. from_json() / to_json() mixins. Dialect for custom conversion rules.

gotchas: Code generation at class definition time — class body must be picklable
Less mature ecosystem than pydantic — fewer plugins/integrations
Strict type system — extra fields in dict cause errors by default
Discriminated unions require explicit Annotated configuration
Limited validation vs pydantic — primarily for (de)serialization not validation
best_when: High-throughput serialization where pydantic is a bottleneck
Pure serialization/deserialization without complex validation logic
When msgspec is unavailable but similar performance is needed
Dataclass-first codebases needing fast dict/JSON/msgpack encoding
avoid_when: When validation is primary concern — use pydantic
When msgspec is acceptable (even faster, lighter)
Projects needing broad ecosystem integration (FastAPI, SQLModel)
summary: mashumaro provides fast serialization for Python dataclasses via code generation. DataClassDictMixin.from_dict() / to_dict(). JSONDecoder(User).decode(). Multiple codecs: dict, JSON, msgpack, orjson. 2-10x faster than pydantic v1. Apache-2.0 by Fatal1ty. Best for high-throughput serialization of dataclasses. Less ecosystem than pydantic. Primarily serialization not validation. Code generation at class definition.
